items.condition: Sustained shrinkage of permitted operating domains
items.detail: Material rollbacks without replacement pathways imply the urban-first scaling path is wrong or the timeline is far longer.

items.condition: ADS safety persistently below credible human baselines
items.detail: Transparent, comparable frequency or severity data that do not converge undermine liability and adoption assumptions.

items.condition: Personal-auto results improve structurally without a frequency story
items.detail: Durable combined-ratio improvement while autonomous miles rise would suggest the short-exposure leg is mis-specified.

items.condition: Capital and programs exit urban L4 for assist-only roadmaps
items.detail: Industry-wide deferral of city autonomy in favor of L2/L3 only compresses enabler multiples and shifts outcomes to fleet-led names.

items.condition: Ride-hail utilization and pricing collapse ahead of AV cost relief
items.detail: Oversupply or regulatory drag without offsetting cost structure would slow the shift from ownership to on-demand miles.

items.condition: Passenger vehicle residuals strengthen broadly for years
items.detail: Resilient ownership demand alongside pilots weakens the depreciation and utilization channel of the thesis.
